accessibility.photo_of_the_speakers_from_2024: A picture of the speakers from the 2024 conference

2026.subtitle: The Czech Vue.js conference
2026.where: We will meet at {venue} in Karlín district
2026.what: You will learn about new technologies and tooling that will help you create awesome webapps in no time. This year, you won't only listen, you will also have a chance to turn ideas into reality with rapid AI-infused development. Our team of skilled speakers and mentors will be there to guide you and together we will create amazing things in just a fraction of a day. How does that sound?
2026.more: {soon} Meanwhile, you can subscribe to our newsletter to get the most recent updates straight to your inbox.
2026.soon: More details will be announced soon.

buttons.speaker: I want to talk at PragVue
buttons.hotel: Contact us for the hotel discount

home.conference_info_1: PragVue is back for its second edition, celebrating the power and potential of Vue.js in the heart of Europe. We’re bringing famous names from the Vue.js community to the City of a Hundred Spires for an event packed with inspiring talks. It’s the perfect opportunity to grow your skills, network with like-minded professionals, and stay ahead in the rapidly evolving world of Vue.js.
home.conference_info_2: Vue.js is easy to learn, scalable, highly performant thanks to its coherent reactivity system, and has a rich ecosystem of surrounding libraries. Despite its greatness, Vue.js remains undiscovered by many. That's precisely why we're hosting this conference - to delve deeper into its potential and shed light on its remarkable capabilities.
home.early_bird_tickets_info: Early bird ticket price is only available until the end of June
home.speakers_info: Get ready to be inspired by an outstanding lineup of Vue.js community members who will share their knowledge, hands-on experience, and fresh perspectives. Expect everything from a closer look at ecosystem tools to big-picture views on modern web practices. Whether you’re a long-time Vue enthusiast or just starting out, you’ll find plenty to spark new ideas. Don’t miss the opportunity to learn from and connect with skilled professionals.
home.speakers_you_info: We are still looking for a few more speakers! Whether you're an experienced conference patron or seeking your first opportunity to shine, now's your chance. If you have something to share about Vue, contact us via the button below to discuss the details.
home.look_back_on_2024: PragVue 2024 was a blast! Last year, we hosted the first Czech Vue.js conference. Thank you to all the attendees and all the speakers. We’re hoping to make the next one even better!
home.link_2024: Speakers from the 2024 conference - click to check details
home.venue_info: PragVue will take place at {hotel} conveniently located in the center of Prague, just one block away from Wenceslas Square and within walking distance from all 3 metro lines as well as the main railway station. This makes it a perfect place to host a decent international event. It offers modern conference rooms and equipment as well as first class catering that will be ready to serve on 23 September 2025.
home.venue_offer: The 5-star {hotel} also offers comfortable overnight accommodation without having to worry about navigating around the city. We’ve arranged a special partnership offer for {offer} for all PragVue guests! Contact us after completing your ticket purchase to receive this benefit.
home.prague_info: It isn't just about frontend development. PragVue also gives you a chance to explore Prague's stunning Gothic and Baroque architecture, vibrant history, and modern culture. Discover the world's largest ancient castle at Prague Castle, walk the famous Charles Bridge over the Vltava River, and observe the marvelous Astronomical Clock in the historic Old Town Square. And there is much more to do, both during the day and in the night alike. Prague offers a perfect mix of history, culture, nature, and tech, ensuring a fulfilling visit alongside your professional engagements.
home.sponsors_info: Gain valuable exposure, connect with a passionate audience of developers, and help us shape the future of Vue.js by sponsoring PragVue. {br}{br} Seize this chance to connect with talented developers, share your vision, and shine a spotlight on your brand.

subscribe.description: Get the latest news about PragVue conference straight to your inbox.

consent.foreword: I consent to the processing of my personal data (specifically my email address) by Atos Czech Republic s.r.o., as the data controller, for the purpose of registration to receive information about the PragVue 2026 conference to be held on 29.09.2026, about future editions of the PragVue conference in subsequent years, and about related events, including:
consent.point1: information about the program, speakers, and accompanying events
consent.point2: organizational and practical information related to the conference
consent.point3: Providing this consent is voluntary and it is not a condition for registration for the conference or using other services
consent.point4: personal data will be processed to the extent of: email address
consent.point5: I may withdraw my consent at any time by clicking the unsubscribe link in any email sent or by contacting the controller
consent.point6: withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing prior to its withdrawal
consent.afterword: By submitting the form / checking the box, I expressly confirm that I have read the information above and grant this consent.

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.terms_required: You must agree to the text above

2024.title: PragVue 2024
2024.about: The first PragVue was held on 17 September 2024. It was a rather small meetup, but we saw eight Vue/Nuxt developers giving their interesting talks, and new friendships were formed.
